package rulecoverage

func NegativeSingleImplInterface() string {
    ruleID := "single_impl_interface"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repository-local interfaces with one obvious implementation and a very small consumer surface."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
